name: Tuna Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a saucepan. Stir in flour and salt.
2. Remove from heat and gradually stir in milk, keeping the mixture smooth.
3. Return to moderate heat and continue stirring until the sauce thickens and comes to a boil.
4. Add onions and cheese.
5. With a whisk, beat egg yolks one at a time into the mixture.
6. Stir in tuna, parsley, and mushrooms.
7. Allow to cool for 10 minutes.
8. Beat egg whites with sugar until they form stiff peaks.
9. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the tuna mixture.
10. Turn the batter into an ungreased 2-quart souffle dish or large Corningware casserole.
11. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F until the top is golden and a knife inserted comes out clean, about 45-50 minutes.
